import io
import string
import list

fn find_index(_ tokens: List<String>, _ token: String) -> Int
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < tokens.len()
    let t = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    if t == token and found == -1
      found = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn increment_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < counts.len()
    let v = match counts.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == idx
      result = list.push(result, v + 1)
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let words = string.split_whitespace(text)

  mut tokens: List<String> = []
  mut counts: List<Int> = []

  mut wi = 0
  while wi < words.len()
    let word = match words.get(wi)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      ""
    end
    let idx = find_index(tokens, word)
    if idx == -1
      tokens = list.push(tokens, word)
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
    else
      counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
    end
    wi = wi + 1
  end

  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let cnt = match counts.get(i)
    when Some(c)
      c
    when None
      0
    end
    if cnt > best_count
      best_token = tok
      best_count = cnt
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
end
